title: Delicate Vermicelli Pasta Bake
description: A simple and flavorful pasta dish, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe combines delicate flavors with the classic taste of pasta.
instructions: Cook the delicate pasta according to package directions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the shredded basque cheese and stir until melted.
Combine the cooked pasta and cheese mixture in a baking dish.
Top with chopped parsley and bake for 10-12 minutes.
